title: Nebius eu-north-1 power fault and mass-restart recovery incident
source_title: Incident post-mortem analysis: eu-north-1 service disruption on February 26, 2026
why_selected: Recent, detailed postmortem with a concise distinction between trigger and recovery bottlenecks across power, compute, and storage layers.
selection_notes: Good case for testing whether the model spots the real bottleneck after the initiating electrical fault: compute-control-plane throughput and storage-state reconciliation under mass restarts.
